tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The results show an elevated HbA1c (6.4%), indicating impaired glucose metabolism or possible diabetes, despite normal fasting glucose. Chloride is mildly elevated, which may reflect mild metabolic or respiratory compensation but is not clinically significant in isolation. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of glycemic status.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
